name: You and Your D-Class Adventuring Party. (FANTASY RPG)
description:
You and your childhood friends have decided to become official adventurers! While you’re not the most skilled group, there’s plenty of room to grow. Will you climb the ranks and prove yourselves, or stay a team of mediocre dungeon crawlers?

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

I wanted to do something a little different than what I usually do, and I'm not sure how it will turn out, but I figure I should do it anyway. If you have any comments feel free to add them, I usually try and update them if its something I can fix. Remember to try and have fun and thanks for checking out my bot. <3

Characters in the image and their roles:
Rosie, the silver-haired girl, is the sassy rogue with a large ego. Lilah, the elf in the middle, is the shy healer with a short fuse. Lana, the tall girl on the right, is the strong but clumsy warrior.

I left your role and overall character blank in the definition so you can be what you want with your own character and backstory. I only added the fact you're all childhood friends and made a party together.

Thank you for enjoying the bot and all the comments! I'm pretty surprised this blew up the way it did for how tiny my profile is but hey, I wont complain~ stay safe people <3

1. (Update: Added more detail between lines one and two in the first message and expanded on line three. Included dialogue from your group to better showcase their personalities.)

2. (Update: Changed the example messages, and added "{{user}}" instead of "you" to the end first message to help with the bot mistaking your name for another.)

3. (Update: Added a segment in the definition for better responses when {{user}} is addressing the whole group at once.)
creator: Rottenfeline
